buildings.name: Gatherer's Hut
buildings.notes: Auto-despawns 2 min after advancing to Era 2 (except Feraldis).

uiHints.description: Grants 1 Sect Point and provides a single chapel slot.

technologies.name: Advance to Era II
technologies.effect: Unlocks cultural choice (Runai, Feraldis, Alanthor). Starts 2-minute auto-despawn on all Gatherer's Huts (except Feraldis).

technologies.name: Improved Tools
technologies.desc: Upgrades villager tools to improve gathering speed.

technologies.name: Storage Carts
technologies.desc: Increases carry capacity for gatherers and builders.

technologies.name: Basic Drills
technologies.desc: Increases melee unit attack speed and discipline.

technologies.name: Wooden Armor
technologies.desc: Simple plated bark and cloth padding improve survivability.

eras.note: Choose exactly one culture. Existing buildings re-skin to chosen culture.

main.name: Thessara's Bazaar
main.role: Mobile trade HQ / Tariffs / Trains light military

mechanics: Trade Hubs auto-spawn caravans on valid routes.
Caravans earn more over distance and tariff auras.

tech.effect: +15% Supplies from trade routes; +25% if route length > 60u.
Reduce pack/unpack time by 40%; Bazaar gains +200 HP while packed.
Trade Hubs spawn 2 uncontrollable escorts with each Caravan. Each active Caravan grants +2 population housing.

economy.supplies: Gatherer's Huts persist; can be upgraded to Hunting Lodges or Logging Stations
mechanics: Gain supplies by attacking non-military units.

buildings.name: Totem Tower
buildings.role: Defensive tower (arrow fire, detects bloody ground to empower)

buildings.name: Longhouse
buildings.role: Batch-trains melee (5 or 10) with small discount

tech.effect: Killing non-military units grants +15 Supplies and +1 Iron per kill to the attacker's owner.
Units can carry up to 5 Iron; each grants +2% attack (stacks).

economy.supplies: Only from walled compartments; upgrades on walls improve resource rates.
mechanics: When a wall segment in a compartment falls, its compartment's income pauses until repaired.

buildings.name: Wall Tower
buildings.role: Wall instance upgraded to ranged tower

buildings.name: Wall Gate
buildings.role: Wall instance upgraded to gate - auto-opens for friendlies

buildings.name: Garrison
buildings.role: Train heavy infantry / Provides housing / Garrison point

tech.name: Stone Ledgers
tech.effect: Each closed wall compartment yields +8 Supplies per 10uÃ‚Â² area per minute.

sects.availability: task-063 phase 1: 12 old sect entries removed. New 12-sect roster (Antiquity / Renewal / Fortitude / Reclamation / Silence / Justice / Veneration / Witness / War / Ash / Ruin / Wrath) is data-driven via SectConfig and SectDefinition ScriptableObjects, not this JSON. Phase 2 will reintroduce sect-tech entries here if any are needed; for now the list is empty.

mineCrystal.storage: Depots; can be stolen if destroyed.

glow.source: Colossal crystal units or sect grants
